name: Plaid Token Lifecycle Conformance
description: Code handling Plaid Link tokens must be verified against the Plaid Link Reference Model — token exchange only after successful link, proper expiration handling.
rationale: Plaid's Link token lifecycle has strict ordering requirements. Exchanging a token before the user completes Link, or using an expired token, causes silent failures that are hard to debug.

examples.passes: Formalize(plaidLinkHandler) → Verify(conforms to Plaid ref model: proved)
